title: The Farmer Dweller Reborn
description: A terrible farmer is thirsty for revenge, but he's not so bad...
body:
##                            Geckolib is required for the mod to work!



![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a957c029ab64b9db3c40ee683f2fe2fa4d19f627.png)


This is a remake of the original mod: The Farmer Dweller!



He doesn't see anything, but he feels...


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### DESCREPTION:
This mod will introduce several creatures:
 The Farmer is a farmer who once tended his fields and lived a normal life, but now mercilessly destroys everything! Why? See the lore below... Now he runs fast, can climb walls, and reacts to certain sounds. He also has a chase theme, but when he runs, maybe I should give him something?
The Shadower is a forest-dwelling creature, a bloodthirsty hunter bent on killing. It's all his fault...
Shadow Worker is a forest-dwelling creature. Almost nothing is known about him, but he's afraid of many things and runs fast.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



# LORE:
The farmer was simply plowing the beds at night, filling composters and just going about his business when suddenly a figure appeared in the forest, he came a little closer, but it was no longer there and he thought that he imagined it...



When he finished, he was already packing up for home, but something touched his shoulder... That was it. Frightened, he turned around, but no one was there. Then he remembered he'd left the rake in the middle of the garden beds...



Then this creature appeared...



The creature was a Shadower, and it pierced the farmer's back with its sharp hand. He fell face-first onto the rake... He couldn't move, and the creature vanished.



He lay there for two years with his back pierced. During that time, his back healed. When he finally got up, he couldn't see anything, as the rake had blinded him. He desperately wanted to take revenge on the creature and kill it. He had to hunt with everything he could sense to find that very monster... But maybe the player can do something about it?


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8c9ddd7ba96854cf84db724c009aaedf37506_0.webp)
